original_image_tags: Aged, tan-colored typewritten document with visible hole punches at the top. The text is clear and legible. Handwritten annotations and stamps are present in the margins and at the bottom.
Bottom of page showing filing codes and handwritten annotations.

elements.description: The entire page is a single United States Government Office Memorandum form containing typed text describing an informant's report on a 'sphere-like object' sighted on October 20, 1950. There are handwritten annotations and stamps, but no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts.

judge.reason: The descriptions are factually inconsistent on the page's visual content: Description A claims the page has hole punches, while Description B states it is a typed memorandum form with no real visual content, leading to a direct contradiction on the presence of specific visual elements.
